title: thesium humifusum var. oranense
intro: Thesium humifusum var. oranense is a medicinal plant species, commonly known as the Oran woolly thyme, which belongs to the Thymelaeaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Thesium humifusum var. oranense include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
